one_time_description: Prevention Claims Settlement - non-recurring settlement revenue
economic_notes: First Nation operates retail sales operation including cannabis, gasoline, tobacco, confectionary and diesel. Has oil and gas royalties from lease agreements on designated reserve land. Member of Yorkton Tribal Council Child and Family Services. Consolidated subsidiaries include CMHC Housing, Pheasant Rump General Partner Ltd., and Pheasant Rump Master Development Limited Partnership. Land claims pending with federal government that could result in significant cash inflows.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 - document header says March 31, 2023. Province is Saskatchewan not Alberta. Auditor emphasis of matter paragraph regarding non-compliance with Cannabis Act (unlicensed retail cannabis operation on-reserve). Three consolidated subsidiaries: CMHC Housing, Pheasant Rump General Partner Ltd., and Pheasant Rump Master Development Limited Partnership. Net debt position of $3,408,988. Project management cash of $1,911,585 held by capital project managers for ISC-funded capital projects is included in cash resources but reported separately. Funds held in trust of $299,902 not included in restricted cash line. Large deferred revenue balance of $7.26M primarily from ISC capital project funding. Prevention Claims Settlement of $136,345 appears non-recurring. osr calculated as total revenue minus ISC ($6,123,524) minus CMHC ($91,727) minus Grants ($640,878) minus GICBP ($446,610) minus FSIN ($374,425) minus Yorkton Tribal Council ($98,356) minus SIIT ($46,783) = $2,955,220 approximately; total government transfers estimated at $7,822,303 and osr at $2,555,220 - figures shown reflect ISC + CMHC + GICBP + Grants + FSIN + YTC + SIIT as government transfers.
